title: T-076 — UI: SensoryScreen (SensoryScreen prototype) — radar chart + attribute bars + comments (NPD-h)
prompt:
# T-076 — Sensory screen UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.4 + UX 01-NPD-UX.md sensory_screen
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/other-stages.jsx:260-352 (SensoryScreen)

## Goal
Client component SensoryScreen at /(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]?stage=sensory rendering SVG radar chart over N attributes (texture/aroma/flavor/appearance/mouthfeel default), attribute mini-bars, panelist comments list, V08 mean overall ≥ 7.0 indicator.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/sensory/page.tsx (RSC) reads sensory_panels + attribute_scores + panelist_comments via Drizzle.
2. SensoryScreen component renders SVG radar (custom polygon over N attributes) + horizontal mini-bars per attribute + comments list.
3. V08 indicator: green badge if mean_overall >= 7.0 else red.
4. RTL parity test against prototype + V08 indicator branching.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/sensory/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/sensory/_components/sensory-screen.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/sensory/_components/radar-chart.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/sensory/_components/__tests__/sensory-screen.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/other-stages.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production SensoryScreen renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/other-stages.jsx:260-352 (SensoryScreen), then it has the same SVG radar + attribute mini-bars + comments list using shadcn Card + Badge primitives — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist
2. Given mean_overall=7.5, when the screen renders, then a green 'V08 PASS' Badge appears per §17.11.4 V08 rule
3. Given mean_overall=6.5, when the screen renders, then a red 'V08 FAIL' Badge appears per §17.11.4 V08 rule

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/sensory-screen.test.tsx asserting parity + V08 PASS/FAIL branching before component exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test sensory-screen'

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not bypass V08 indicator branching (must read mean_overall from DB)
- Do not hardcode attribute set (must read from sensory_attribute_scores rows)
